summary.en: Execute a SQL statement that may mutate database state (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DDL).
summary.zh_CN: 执行可变更数据库状态的 SQL（INSERT、UPDATE、DELETE、DDL 等）。

requiredEnvironment.name: CAP_SQLITEDB_PATH
requiredEnvironment.description: When using the sqlitedb module: filesystem path to the SQLite database file.

requiredEnvironment.name: CAP_POSTGRESDB_URL
requiredEnvironment.description: When using the postgresdb module: PostgreSQL connection URI.
